Bash(GROQ_API_KEY=test python3 -c "
from providers.registry import ProviderRegistry

reg = ProviderRegistry\(\)
reg.discover\(\)
print\('Providers with GROQ key:', list\(reg.list_providers\(\).keys\(\)\)\)
print\('Models:', [\(m.provider, m.id, m.roles\) for m in reg.list_all_models\(\)]\)
dd = reg.find_default_director\(\)
if dd:
    print\(f'Default director: {dd[0].name}/{dd[1].id}'\)
else:
    print\('Director: Groq fallback check...'\)
    for m in reg.list_director_models\(\):
        print\(f'  candidate: {m.id}'\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import py_compile
files = [
    'chatbot.py', 'app.py', 'groq_engine.py', 'director.py',
    'orchestrator.py', 'benchmark.py',
    'providers/__init__.py', 'providers/base.py',
    'providers/groq_provider.py', 'providers/openai_provider.py',
    'providers/anthropic_provider.py', 'providers/google_provider.py',
    'providers/registry.py',
]
for f in files:
    py_compile.compile\(f, doraise=True\)
    print\(f'  ✅ {f}'\)
print\(f'\\nAll {len\(files\)} files compile on Python 3.13!'\)
")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile\('app.py', doraise=True\); print\('app.py compiles OK'\)")
